name: flow-cnh
description: Real-time cross-border payment streaming powered by AxCNH on Conflux eSpace

scripts.deploy:testnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url https://evmtestnet.confluxrpc.com --broadcast -vvv
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
